name: Baked Ziti with Ricotta Cheese
recipeIngredient: 15 oz ricotta cheese, part skim milk, or cottage cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, combine ricotta cheese, eggs, Parmesan cheese, and black pepper.
3. In another bowl, thoroughly combine the cooked pasta and tomato sauce.
4. Place half of the pasta mixture in a 13" x 9" baking dish.
5. Evenly top with the cheese mixture.
6. Add the remaining pasta to the dish.
7. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese over the top.
8. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until bubbly.
